metricNotes.chargingUnits: Count of BNetzA Ladeeinrichtung records, not unique physical sites.
metricNotes.reportedNominalKw: Sum of source-reported nominal power; not utilization or installed grid capacity.
metricNotes.dcFastPct: Share of charging points whose row has charger_type = 'Schnellladeeinrichtung'.
metricNotes.normalPct: Share of charging points whose row does not have charger_type = 'Schnellladeeinrichtung'.
metricNotes.powerClassPct: Charging-point shares grouped by max_plug_power_kw: 150+, 50-149, and lower or missing.
metricNotes.connectorUnitPct: Share of charging units listing each connector type; connector categories overlap.
metricNotes.paymentPct: Share of charging units listing each payment option; payment categories overlap.
metricNotes.topOperatorPct: Operator concentration shares are based on reportedNominalKw unless the field name says otherwise.
metricNotes.addedLast12Mo: Rows commissioned during the 12 months before generatedThrough.
metricNotes.cities: City grain is state + district + city; distinct city names are tracked separately.
